name: Zurich/Luzern/Zug Weekly Events Scout
execution: local — Windows Task Scheduler on user's machine

categories.comedy: Famous English-speaking stand-up comedians — Zurich, Luzern, Zug
categories.megastars: Globally A-list music artists (household names worldwide) — Zurich, Luzern, Zug
categories.nancy_ajram: Any Nancy Ajram appearance anywhere in Europe (Switzerland flagged)
categories.classical: World-class classical soloists, orchestras, and ballet companies — Zurich, Luzern, Zug
categories.gogol_bordello: Any Gogol Bordello appearance anywhere in Europe (Switzerland flagged)
categories.art_exhibitions: Major art exhibitions at significant museums — Zurich, Luzern, Zug, Basel, Bern, Winterthur, Aarau, Schaffhausen

email_send_method: Python smtplib via smtp.gmail.com:587 (runs locally, no cloud blocking)
